message:
fix: use SHOW COLUMNS in uuid_primary_keys migration to avoid server-mode crash (fix-merge PR #2751)

Replace information_schema.COLUMNS query with SHOW COLUMNS to avoid
'no root value found in session' errors in Dolt server mode. Aligns with
existing columnExists() pattern in helpers.go (GH#2051).

Co-Authored-By: Marco Del Pin <marcodelpin@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
